title: Elementor Reloaded
description: Elementor Reloaded is a plugin designed to boost your multiplayer friends SMP experience. It brings in four elements - fire, water, earth and air to the game. Every element has its item and powers.
body:
# **Elementor Reloaded**

Elementor Reloaded is a gameplay enhancement plugin for Minecraft servers, built to introduce elemental abilities and RPG-style progression into your SMP world. Developed with a focus on stability, performance, and compatibility, this plugin brings fire, water, earth, and air to life—each with unique powers, mechanics, and team dynamics. If you've ever wanted to bring elemental gameplay to your server without sacrificing the vanilla Minecraft experience, Elementor Reloaded makes it possible.

🧪 Over 300 hours of development and testing
🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Perfect for duo-SMPs, community servers, or large-scale public servers
🌍 Built to run smoothly on Paper, Purpur, and other modern server forks

🔥 The Four Elements
Upon joining the server, each player is randomly assigned one of four elements:
Fire – Offensive abilities, area damage, and rapid movement
Water – Crowd control, and terrain adaptation
Earth – Defensive strength, resistance, and manipulation of terrain
Air – Speed, evasion, and vertical mobility

Every element has a unique skill set and passive traits that evolve over time, enabling players to shape combat and exploration strategies around their assigned type.

⚙️ Installation & Setup: Simply drop the plugin .jar file into your server's plugins folder. Restart the server, and you're ready to go. The plugin auto-generates a simple config file. You can tweak cooldowns, ability strength, element distribution method, and more. No MySQL or external dependencies required.

🧑‍💻 Compatibility: Elementor Reloaded works out of the box with:
Paper 1.21+ (recommended)
Purpur
Spigot 

🤝 Multiplayer-Ready: Whether you're building a small survival world with two friends or launching a fully public SMP with many players, Elementor Reloaded is the go. Players are balanced.

✅ Balanced for 2-60+ players
✅ Fair matchmaking and randomization
✅ Lightweight, optimized code with low tick impact

⚠️ Requirements & Notes
1. Java 17+ required (as per latest Minecraft server versions)
2. Compatible with other gameplay and RPG plugins
3. Fully customisable through commands
4. Built with performance in mind; async tasks where possible.

**Your donation can add up to many future projects. Consider donating if possible on Patreon.**
https://patreon.com/c/Lab18bke
